compiled_state.title: merge-to-main: local main version drift -> plugin.json conflict on retry after interrupted version_bump
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
When merge-to-main.sh completes version_bump but fails before push (e.g. SIGURG/timeout), local main retains the bumped version. On the next merge-to-main invocation, the merge phase conflicts because the worktree (synced to origin/main) has the old version and local main has the bumped version.

## Expected Behavior
merge-to-main.sh should detect that local main is ahead of origin/main on plugin.json version and reset or reconcile before attempting the merge.

## Actual Behavior
merge-to-main --resume retries the merge phase but hits an unresolvable plugin.json conflict. The squash-rebase recovery also fails. The only fix is manually running git -C MAIN_REPO reset --hard origin/main.

## Observed
baff-7163 session: local main had version 1.12.26, origin/main had 1.12.25. Merge conflict blocked merge-to-main until manually reset.

## Escalation Policy: Escalate when blocked

comments.body: Fix ready (opus investigation + code reviewer passed score=5): mirror _phase_sync drift-detection-and-reset block into _phase_merge after 'cd "$MAIN_REPO"', so --resume correctly resets stale local main before retrying merge. ESCALATED: test gate blocks commit due to pre-existing test-batched.sh flakiness in merge-to-main tests (3 tests pass standalone but fail under test-batched.sh). Fix content reverted pending resolution of the flakiness.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Gate 1a: skipped — CLI_user tag present; intent-aligned assumed
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 3 (INTERMEDIATE) — drift-reset block missing in _phase_merge() for --resume path
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Hypothesis: _phase_merge() lacks the drift-detection-and-reset block that _phase_sync() has. When --resume skips _phase_sync and enters _phase_merge directly with local main ahead of origin/main (e.g., after interrupted version_bump), the stale version bump commit causes plugin.json conflict on merge retry. Fix: mirror _phase_sync's drift-reset block into _phase_merge after cd MAIN_REPO. RED test: test_merge_phase_resets_stale_ahead_local_main confirmed failing. Approved for implementation.
comments.author: Test
